definition: Laws regulating AI-generated media that could deceive, harm, or manipulate (deepfakes, CSAM, intimate images, political advertising, likeness).
orrick_ai_scope: AI CSAM; AI Intimate Images; AI in Political Advertising; AI Likeness; AI Deepfakes

definition: Laws governing automated or algorithmic decision-making that affects individuals (ADMT, credit, employment, housing scoring).
Laws governing government procurement, deployment, or use of AI systems by public sector entities.
Laws requiring disclosure, labeling, or notice of AI use to end-users (watermarking, AI interaction notice).
Laws governing AI use in healthcare settings (clinical decision support, medical imaging, patient-facing AI).
Laws governing AI use in hiring, performance management, and workforce decisions.
Laws governing AI in social media platforms, content moderation, and recommendation algorithms.
orrick_ai_scope: AI in Social Media & Online Platforms

definition: Laws establishing AI liability, safety standards, or comprehensive AI governance frameworks (frontier AI, general purpose AI).
orrick_ai_scope: AI Liability; Comprehensive AI; Frontier or General-Purpose AI; AI in Critical Infrastructure

definition: Laws governing AI-related privacy obligations, data handling, and data subject rights in AI contexts.
Laws governing AI in a specific sector not captured above (real estate, insurance, education, financial services, retail).
orrick_ai_scope: AI in Real Estate; AI in Insurance; AI in Education; Algorithmic Pricing
